articles.title: S&P 500 closes lower Monday as oil prices continue their climb: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: The S&P 500 fell on Monday, weighed down by further gains in oil prices and a steep decline in tech.
articles.content:
The S&P 500 fell on Monday, weighed down by further gains in oil prices and a steep decline in tech, as traders looked past comments from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on inflation.
